name: pixa-agent
description: AI coding agent for Pixa IDE — plans, edits, and runs tasks in your workspace with your approval.

commands.title: Pixa: Debug Semantic Search (test query, no LLM)

pixa.defaultModel.description: Model id used by default. Built-in ids come from models.json; custom ones are "provider:model" (e.g. "ollama:llama3.1").

name.description: Display name shown next to this provider's models.

baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL, e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 (the /chat/completions path is added automatically).

requiresApiKey.description: Set false for local servers that need no credentials (Ollama, LM Studio).

models.description: Map of the provider's model name to display metadata.

name.description: Display name. Defaults to the model key.

supportsTools.description: Set false for chat-only models that cannot call tools.

pixa.maxTokens.description: Maximum completion tokens per request. Lower this if you hit OpenRouter 402 'requires more credits' errors on a low-balance/free account.

pixa.mcpServers.markdownDescription: MCP servers whose tools the agent can use. Example: `{ "filesystem": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "./"] } }`. Reload the window after changing.
